sicurezza.title: Security
sicurezza.subtitle: Protect app access with a 6-digit numeric PIN.
sicurezza.attivo: Active — PIN is required at app startup
sicurezza.disattivato: Disabled — the app opens without protection
sicurezza.rimuoviDesc: Enter the current PIN to confirm removal. The app will open without protection.
sicurezza.info1: The PIN is required every time you launch Sparks3D Preventivi.
sicurezza.info2: It's saved as a cryptographic hash (SHA-256) in the database — even reading the file, the original PIN cannot be recovered.
sicurezza.info3: After 3 wrong attempts, access is locked for 60 seconds.
sicurezza.errCifreUguali: PIN cannot consist of identical digits (e.g. 000000).
sicurezza.errNuovoDiverso: The new PIN must be different from the current one.
sicurezza.successImpostato: PIN set successfully! From now on it will be required at app startup.
sicurezza.successRimosso: PIN removed. The app will open without PIN prompt.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.resetPreventiviSub: Delete all quotes, lines, associated services and withholdings
backup.resetCatalogoLabel: Catalog (materials, printers, profiles, services, carriers, payments)
backup.resetAziendaSub: Reset header and settings to defaults, delete logo
backup.statoDatiDesc: Summary of all data saved by the application.
backup.creaBackupDesc: Export all data to a .zip file. Useful before reinstalling the system or the application.
backup.dbRipristinatoMsg: ⚠️ The restored database will be loaded on next startup.
backup.ripristinaDesc: Select a backup .zip file to restore data. Existing files will be overwritten.
backup.esportaDesc: Export data in CSV (universal) or Excel (.xlsx with formatting) format.
backup.infoExcelFogli: The Excel file will contain one sheet for each data type: Quotes, Clients, Materials, Printers, Profiles and Statistics.
backup.infoCsvMulti: 6 separate CSV files will be created in the same folder as the selected file.
backup.resetDesc: Delete selected data from the database. Useful for cleaning up test data before distribution. It is recommended to create a backup before proceeding.
backup.ripristinoDaFile: You are about to restore data from the file:
backup.dbIrreversibile: ⚠️ The current database will be overwritten. This operation is irreversible. A restart will be required after restore.
backup.resetConfirmMsg: You are about to delete all application data, are you sure?
backup.resetListCatalogo: All catalog (materials, printers, profiles, services, carriers, payments)
backup.resetListImpostazioni: Company data and settings (reset to defaults)
backup.resetIrreversibile: ⚠️ This operation is irreversible. Make sure you have created a backup before proceeding.
backup.resetFinalMsg: All quotes, receipts, invoices, imported data and personal data will be deleted.
backup.senzaBackup: Without a previous backup you will not be able to restore them!

ritenuta.helpPrivato: Occasional service between private parties → no withholding. Gross equals net.

ritenuta.helpRitenuta: A receipt with 20% withholding tax will be generated
ritenuta.helpRicevuta: A receipt without withholding will be generated (between privates)
ritenuta.errImporto: Amount must be greater than zero

licenza.author: Fabio Mazzarella
licenza.appDescription: Sparks3D Preventivi is a desktop software for managing quotes and quotations for FDM 3D printing services, with AMS multi-material support, automatic cost calculation, PDF export and PackLink Pro integration.
licenza.supportText: Sparks3D Preventivi is free software. If you find it useful and want to support development and new feature releases, you can buy me a coffee on Buy Me a Coffee.
licenza.footer: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 — Fabio Mazzarella / Sparks3D.it — 2025/2026 — Some rights reserved

ritenutaPdf.titoloPrivato: RECEIPT FOR OCCASIONAL SERVICE BETWEEN PRIVATE PARTIES
ritenutaPdf.dichOccasionale: The undersigned declares that this service is of an occasional nature pursuant to art. 2222 et seq. of the Civil Code and is not carried out on a habitual and continuous basis.
ritenutaPdf.dichRitenuta: The compensation is subject to a 20% withholding tax pursuant to art. 25 of D.P.R. September 29, 1973, no. 600.
ritenutaPdf.dichReddito: Income from this service is classified as miscellaneous income pursuant to art. 67, paragraph 1, letter l) of T.U.I.R. (D.P.R. 917/1986).
ritenutaPdf.dichNoIva: This service is not subject to VAT pursuant to art. 5 of D.P.R. 633/1972 as it lacks the habituality requirement.
ritenutaPdf.dichPrivato: As this is an occasional service between private parties, the client does not qualify as a withholding agent, therefore the withholding tax pursuant to art. 25 of D.P.R. 600/1973 does not apply.
ritenutaPdf.dichNetto: The gross amount equals the net payable.
ritenutaPdf.marcaDaBolloApposta: On the original of this receipt, a revenue stamp of €
ritenutaPdf.marcaDaBolloAiSensi: has been affixed pursuant to art. 2 of D.P.R. October 26, 1972, no. 642, as the amount exceeds €
ritenutaPdf.dichSoglia: The undersigned also declares not having received in the current year compensation for occasional services exceeding € 5,000.00 in total.

guida.title: User guide
guida.subtitle: Complete manual for Sparks3D Preventivi
guida.panoramica_desc: Sparks3D Preventivi is a desktop application for creating and managing quotes for FDM 3D printing services. It automatically calculates printing costs based on materials, machine time, energy and customizable margins.
guida.panoramica_features_1: Complete quote management with automatic cost calculation
guida.panoramica_features_3: Automatic import of GCode and 3MF files for times and weights
guida.panoramica_features_5: Automatic detection of installed slicers in the sidebar
guida.panoramica_features_6: Optional startup PIN for access protection
guida.panoramica_features_7: Live carrier rates via PackLink Pro
guida.panoramica_features_8: Professional PDF export with logo and company data
guida.panoramica_features_9: Statistics dashboard with KPIs, charts and interactive navigation
guida.panoramica_features_10: Withholding tax and receipt management with integrated archive
guida.panoramica_features_11: Full backup and data restore with guided restart
guida.panoramica_features_12: Data export in CSV and Excel
guida.panoramica_features_14: Customizable theme: font size and accent color
guida.panoramica_features_15: All creation and editing operations on dedicated full-screen pages
guida.dashboard_desc: The Dashboard is the main page of the application. It shows a complete overview of activity with key performance indicators (KPIs).
guida.dashboard_kpi_4_desc: total weight in kg of filament consumed
guida.dashboard_kpi_6_desc: accepted, in production or completed quotes
guida.dashboard_kpi_7_desc: percentage of confirmed quotes out of the total
guida.dashboard_interactive_1_desc: revenue and profit chart for the last 6 months
guida.dashboard_interactive_2_desc: breakdown by status with progress bar. Clicking a status navigates to the filtered quotes list
guida.dashboard_interactive_3_desc: the last 10 quotes created. The quote number is clickable to open it directly, the status badge is clickable to filter
guida.dashboard_interactive_4_desc: the 5 clients with the most revenue, with name and total
guida.preventivi_desc: The quotes module is the core of the software. It allows you to create, edit and export professional quotes for 3D printing services.
guida.preventivi_create_2: A dedicated page opens with all quote fields
guida.preventivi_create_3: Select the client from the dropdown menu (optional)
guida.preventivi_create_5: For each row, specify material, printer, profile, time and weight
guida.preventivi_create_6: The system automatically calculates costs, price and margin
guida.preventivi_gcode_desc: In the row addition modal, you can directly import a GCode or 3MF file. The parser automatically extracts print time, filament weight, and material type. For multi-color 3MF files, all AMS slots are imported automatically.
guida.preventivi_ams_desc_pre: Each quote row supports multiple materials via AMS slots. You can add slots with the
guida.preventivi_ams_desc_post: button in the row modal, assigning material, weight and color to each.
guida.preventivi_delete_desc: Deleting a quote or a print row always requires explicit confirmation through a modal dialog. Pressing "Cancel" preserves the data.
guida.preventivi_pdf_desc_post: to generate a professional document with company logo, client data, row table with cost breakdown, totals, VAT, deposit and conditions.
guida.clienti_desc: The Clients section manages the complete registry of your clients.
guida.clienti_create_2: A dedicated page opens with organized sections
guida.clienti_create_3: Fill in personal data, contacts, address and tax information
guida.clienti_edit_desc: Click on a row in the clients table or on the "Edit" button to open the editing page with all fields pre-filled.
guida.clienti_fields_1_desc: First name, Last name, Company name
guida.clienti_delete_desc: Single or bulk deletion (via checkbox) always requires explicit confirmation. Clients can be associated with quotes through the dropdown menu in the quote form. The client's ZIP code is automatically used to calculate PackLink shipping rates.
guida.impostazioni_desc_pre: Settings are organized in tabs. Each creation and editing section opens a
guida.impostazioni_desc_post: with a "← Go back" button and visual feedback on save.
guida.impostazioni_intestazione_desc: Configure company name, address, VAT number, tax code, email, phone, logo and tax regime. This data appears in the header of exported PDFs.
guida.impostazioni_materiali_desc: Manage the materials catalog with name, specific weight, price per kg, markup percentage, estimated failure percentage and warehouse stock. You can import profiles directly from Bambu Studio, Orca Slicer, Anycubic Slicer Next or Prusa Slicer via the "Import from Slicer" button. Clicking on a material in the list opens the editing page.
guida.impostazioni_stampanti_desc: Configure printers with name, power consumption (kWh) and hourly depreciation cost. Importable from Bambu Studio, Orca Slicer, Anycubic Slicer Next and Prusa Slicer. These values are used to calculate energy and depreciation costs for each quote row.
guida.impostazioni_profili_desc: Manage profiles with layer height, number of walls, infill, top/bottom layers and support type. Importable from Bambu Studio, Orca Slicer, Anycubic Slicer Next and Prusa Slicer.
guida.impostazioni_servizi_desc: Define additional services (post-processing, painting, assembly, etc.) with default amount and markup. Quick presets are available for the most common services. For each service you can choose whether to charge the client, show in the PDF without cost, or keep it as an internal cost.
guida.impostazioni_corrieri_desc: Configure your PackLink Pro API key to get live shipping rates. Enter package dimensions and destination ZIP code to compare available carrier prices. You can save found carriers directly to your catalog.
guida.impostazioni_pagamento_desc: Configure accepted methods (bank transfer, PayPal, cash, Satispay, etc.) with percentage and fixed fees and text to display in the PDF. Quick presets with real fees are available (e.g. PayPal 3.40% + €0.35). A fee simulation shows the impact on quotes of different ranges.
guida.impostazioni_interfaccia_desc: Customize the appearance of the entire application:
guida.impostazioni_interfaccia_2_desc: 10 color themes (Cyan, Blue, Indigo, Purple, Pink, Rose, Orange, Amber, Green, Teal)
guida.impostazioni_interfaccia_post: Changes are saved automatically and applied in real time to all buttons, inputs, badges, tables and tabs in the application.
guida.impostazioni_sicurezza_desc_post: (6 digits) to protect application access. From this tab you can set, change or remove the PIN. For more details see the
guida.ritenute_desc: The Withholdings / Receipts module manages the generation of receipts for occasional services with automatic withholding tax calculation.
guida.ritenute_archivio_desc_post: page in the sidebar shows the complete archive of all generated withholdings, with year filters and text search. Summary KPIs are visible at the top: gross total, withholdings paid, net collected and document count.
guida.ritenute_create_2: A dedicated page opens with the "← Back to Withholdings / Receipts" button
guida.ritenute_create_3: Select the client and optionally the linked quote
guida.ritenute_create_4: Enter the gross amount — the withholding (20%) is automatically calculated for clients with a VAT number
guida.ritenute_create_5_post: to create and save the document
guida.ritenute_actions_2_desc: opens the Documents/Sparks3D/Ritenute/ folder in File Explorer
guida.ritenute_actions_3_desc: removes the withholding from the archive and the associated PDF file
guida.slicer_desc_post: to automatically import print profiles and materials.
guida.slicer_detection_desc: At startup, the application checks which slicers are installed. The sidebar shows an indicator for each: colored dot = installed, red dot = not found.
guida.slicer_open_desc: Clicking on a slicer indicator in the sidebar opens the program directly. If the executable is not found, a warning appears.
guida.slicer_import_desc_pre: In Settings → Materials, Printers and Print Profiles you'll find the
guida.slicer_import_desc_post: button that opens the import page. From there you can choose the source slicer via the tabs at the top (Bambu Studio, Orca Slicer, Anycubic Slicer Next, Prusa Slicer).
guida.slicer_import_details: The import page shows all found profiles in table format with technical details (type, density, cost for filaments; layer height, walls, infill for processes; model and nozzle for machines). You can filter by "User profiles only" to exclude pre-installed ones. Clicking "Import →" opens the creation form pre-filled with data read from the slicer profile.
guida.slicer_prusa_desc: Unlike other slicers that use JSON profiles, Prusa Slicer saves profiles in .ini format (text with key=value pairs). Sparks3D Preventivi automatically converts Prusa fields to the application's internal format:
guida.slicer_prusa_folders: Prusa profile folders have different names: print/ instead of process/ and printer/ instead of machine/. The mapping is handled automatically.
guida.slicer_anycubic_desc: Anycubic Slicer Next is built on Orca Slicer, so it uses the same JSON profile format. All filament, machine and process profiles created in Anycubic Slicer Next are fully compatible with automatic import.
guida.slicer_parser_desc: When adding a row to a quote, you can import a .gcode or .3mf file. The parser automatically extracts:
guida.slicer_parser_compat: Works with files generated by Bambu Studio, Orca Slicer, Anycubic Slicer Next, Prusa Slicer and other compatible slicers.
guida.backup_desc: Create a complete backup in .zip format that includes the database, logos and PDF documents. You can choose which items to include. It is recommended to back up regularly.
guida.backup_restore_desc: Select a .zip backup file to restore data. You can choose whether to restore the database, logos and/or PDF documents separately.
guida.backup_restore_restart: When the restore includes the database, the application shows a warning requiring you to close and reopen the program to load the restored data. A dedicated button allows you to close the application directly.
guida.backup_export_desc: Export data in CSV or Excel (.xlsx) format. You can export quotes, clients, materials, printers, profiles and statistics individually or all at once. The Excel file includes multiple sheets with formatting.
guida.backup_reset_desc: Selectively delete data from the database. Useful for cleaning up test data. Requires double confirmation to prevent accidental deletions. It is recommended to create a backup before proceeding.
guida.sicurezza_desc: Sparks3D Preventivi adopts security measures designed to protect your business and client data on single and shared PCs.
guida.sicurezza_pin_desc_pre: Starting from v1.3.0 you can set a
guida.sicurezza_pin_desc_post: to protect application access. The PIN is required every time you start Sparks3D Preventivi, before showing the main interface.
guida.sicurezza_pin_1_desc_post: and click "Set PIN". Enter your desired PIN and confirm it
guida.sicurezza_pin_2_desc: From the same page, click "Change PIN". The current PIN will be required before setting the new one
guida.sicurezza_pin_3_desc: Click "Remove PIN" and confirm with the current PIN. The app will go back to opening without protection
guida.sicurezza_pin_4_desc: after 3 consecutive failed attempts, access is blocked for 60 seconds
guida.sicurezza_pin_5_desc: the PIN is never stored in plain text. It is stored as a SHA-256 cryptographic hash — even reading the database it is impossible to recover the original PIN
guida.sicurezza_pin_warning_desc: if you forget your PIN there is no automatic recovery procedure. In an emergency you can restore a previous backup.
guida.sicurezza_db_desc_pre: Starting from v1.2.0, the SQLite database is encrypted with
guida.sicurezza_db_desc_post: . All sensitive data — clients, quotes, prices, VAT numbers — are protected and not readable by any external software without the application key. If you have a previous version installed, migration happens automatically and silently on first launch.
guida.sicurezza_api_title: 🔑 PackLink API key in Windows Credential Manager
guida.sicurezza_api_desc_pre: The PackLink Pro API key is not saved in the database but in the
guida.sicurezza_api_desc_post: , the same protected system that Windows uses for network and browser passwords. You can verify it in:
guida.sicurezza_api_desc_path: Control Panel → Credential Manager → Windows Credentials → sparks3d-preventivi
guida.sicurezza_api_warning_desc: the API key is not included in the backup file because it is saved in the Credential Manager for security. After restoring on a different PC you will need to re-enter it in
guida.sicurezza_integrity_desc_pre: Every backup created from v1.2.0 includes a
guida.sicurezza_integrity_desc_post: hash of the database. On restore, the app verifies that the file has not been tampered with or corrupted before applying it. If the hash does not match, the restore is automatically cancelled and all temporary files are deleted.
guida.sicurezza_updates_desc_pre: The automatic update system verifies the
guida.sicurezza_updates_desc_post: of each package before installation. This ensures that updates come exclusively from Sparks3D and have not been modified during download. Verification is mandatory and cannot be disabled.
guida.sicurezza_csp_desc_pre: The interface is protected by a restrictive
guida.sicurezza_csp_desc_post: that prevents the execution of unauthorized scripts, even in the case of malicious content injected via GCode or 3MF files.
guida.sicurezza_roadmap_desc: The following security features are planned for upcoming releases:
guida.sicurezza_roadmap_1_desc: ZIP code, email and VAT number format checking
guida.sicurezza_roadmap_2_desc: access limited to only the necessary slicer paths
guida.novita_v141_1: Discount fix: global/line markup and discount are now auto-saved and recalculated in real time when values change
guida.novita_v141_2: Discount percentage now visible in quote summary and exported PDF
guida.novita_v141_3: Fixed bug where discount was not applied to totals unless "Save" was clicked manually
guida.novita_v140_i18n_1: Interface fully translated into Italian and English
guida.novita_v140_i18n_3: User guide translated in both languages
guida.novita_v140_thumb_1: Automatic thumbnail extraction from 3MF and GCode files
guida.novita_v140_thumb_2: Preview visible in quote line items and edit modal
guida.novita_v140_thumb_3: Multi-plate support: all plate previews visible
guida.novita_v140_thumb_4: Option to include/exclude previews in exported PDF
guida.novita_v140_auto_1: Materials, printers and profiles automatically created from imported GCode/3MF files
guida.novita_v140_auto_2: Model dimensions (bounding box) extracted from file
guida.novita_v140_auto_3: Print plate number extracted and associated with line item
guida.novita_v140_theme_1: All colors adapted for light theme (titles, tables, cards, modals)
guida.novita_v140_theme_2: PIN screen with correct colors regardless of theme
guida.novita_v140_pdf_1: Two-column layout: payment on the left, totals on the right
guida.novita_v140_pdf_2: Model previews below the name in the line items table
guida.novita_v140_pdf_3: Translation fix: regime notes and payment presets always in Italian
guida.novita_v140_fix_1: PackLink API fix: reliable saving with database fallback
guida.novita_v140_fix_2: Correct print time calculation (per plate, not multiplied by quantity)
guida.novita_v140_fix_3: AMS Slot renamed to Material Slot
guida.novita_prusa_1_post: : installation detection, profile import, quick launch from sidebar
guida.novita_prusa_2_post: profiles — different format from Bambu/Orca/Anycubic JSON, handled automatically
guida.novita_prusa_3: Automatic mapping of Prusa folders to internal format
guida.novita_prusa_5_post: tab (orange 🟠) in the profile import page
guida.novita_prusa_6: Sidebar with Prusa Slicer indicator (orange) — clickable to open the program
guida.novita_prusa_7: Orange "Prusa" badge in Materials, Printers and Profiles tables for imported data
guida.novita_prusa_8: Profiles read from %APPDATA%\PrusaSlicer — also supports alpha/beta versions
guida.novita_prusa_9: Updated splash screen: shows status of all four slicers
guida.novita_pin_2: Dedicated unlock screen with animated boxes, 3D effect and background with moving particles
guida.novita_pin_4: PIN saved as SHA-256 hash in database — not recoverable in plain text
guida.novita_pin_5_post: tab in Settings to manage PIN (set / change / remove)
guida.novita_pin_6: PIN is automatically removed on full settings reset
guida.novita_backup_1_post: with summary of selected items and overwrite warning
guida.novita_backup_2_post: appears that prevents continuing to use the app with inconsistent data
guida.novita_backup_3: Dedicated button to close and restart the application directly from the modal
guida.novita_v120_5_post: system with cryptographic signature and in-app banner
guida.novita_v103_2: Complete interface refactoring: dedicated pages instead of popup modals
guida.novita_v102_1: Explicit confirmation for deleting quotes, rows and clients
guida.novita_v102_2: Interactive dashboard with clickable labels and numbers
guida.novita_v102_3: Dynamic theme: accent color and font size
guida.antivirus_desc_1: some antivirus software (e.g. Kaspersky, Windows Defender) may flag the installer as suspicious. This is a
guida.antivirus_desc_2: due to the lack of a digital signature (Code Signing). The source code is completely open source and verifiable on
